intended_use: Synapse 3D Base Tools is medical imaging software that is intended to provide trained medical professionals with tools to aid them in reading, interpreting, reporting, and treatment planning. Synapse
intended_use_full: Synapse 3D Base Tools is medical imaging software that is intended to provide trained medical professionals with tools to aid them in reading, interpreting, reporting, and treatment planning. Synapse 3D Base Tools accepts DICOM compliant medical images acquired from a variety of imaging devices including, CT, MR, CR, US, NM, PT, and XA, etc.
ground_truth: Manual segmentation/annotation (implied by DICE comparison metric)
other_metrics: DICE coefficient (Dice Similarity Coefficient) reported for multiple anatomical structures ranging from 0.60 to 0.99; 95% Hausdorff Distance and Mean Surface Distance also reported
